content: I was just thinking about how cool Ghelot wod would be

dam Zyo really wasn’t kidding

Ghelot exalt+wod is really just a “randomly one shot someone”
Ghelot damage came from nuking Thais with cards, Thais healing back to full, then exalt dunking her
but also wow Sanga is really op in this mode especially with grace
weak pierce and fortress makes her nigh unkillable
who knew all I needed to succeed was to shamelessly copy Zyo’s team, do a few tweaks, and then win
They buffed her exalt in previous patches
You give 2 amp
And also the buff that increase 25% dmg
So obviously it will hurt
Those buff are multiplucative
Not additives if i'm not wrong
dear god
Btw not sure if pandia is the best solution
honestly
You steal their alienus but buff them too
I had no idea who shoukd go in that kast slot
Faros
actually reference to last match

first Pandia exalt I used shortly after Sanga exalt for the amp

second use was at the end to void Lotan who was gonna frenzy loop my ass
Pandia feels really good in this gamemode
They bring the wheel that rewind state now for even if you steal alienus + kill, they rewind and it does nothing
also I don’t think anyone expects Pandia to suddenly execute someone with a 20 damage card
You use faros to shuffle unequal exchange as much as possible
And it helps you shuffle your deck more often with draw cards and select card
They full play rng
No too much strat involved
rng in the rng gamemode <:doll_ign:1468259900655145213>
fun
but idk, whenever I don’t run Pandia I always think dam I wish I had Pandia for this situation
It's basically just your typical doresain ogier team
But with rng
Nobody want their alienus to get stolen in the team
If you exalt at 0 alienus you amplify them but at the same time pandia becomes useless because of 0 alienus
alright I’ll try Faros
You probably also need ogier
no
Because he have dispel on taunt
you aren’t taking my Sanga <:sanga_behave:1468259633822175262>
she the goat
Dispel on taunt and can focus target
You can snipe their enemy doresain or doll or whatever
At least, put sanga 2nd position
If you taunt, they can do pierce stuff on her and doresain get hit too
true…
2nd position make them hit faros on pierce
Faros cards not forcibly needed to be used contrary to doresain or others
Gotta trust the #1 ranked player

but idk, Ghelot basically will die almost immidietly bc yeah its Ghelot what do you expect

and I’ve been really valuing Sanga’s lategame potential and idk if I’d rather have Sanga die sooner to keep Faros alive who does eh <:idk:1356084138280489080> or risk Doresian getting exploded
There are strat of making her low, exalt, rewind
many things to think about…
how bad of a debuff is rewind time
You also try to shuffle taunt to mitigate ghelot dmg taken
20% dmg, heal, shield reduc
glup…
And your max hp get shafted
*glup…*
But you rewind because the enemy used all of his cards that could wipe your team
So they need to shuffle it back when the deck reset
You get a tempo
And you can kill their most annoying units
Just like i did with doresain run
so basically, perm cripple yourself but in exchange enemy is basically stunned for like 2-3 turns
Yeah
hrmmmm
English players rise up
Luckily I'm a night owl so I'm usually up to play during the popular queue times like right at daily reset

I love this data is flesh spam meta.
Best mechanic ever.
It's so much fun deciding the game on posse rng.
Having so much fun scamming your twin with casino posse.
I pulled a Gateway the turn after they bursted.
They should've played around it.
The devs really killed my alva team tbh
Analysis of death nerf cost

Nobleman staff stun you
Pandia nerf charge into 3
Meanwhile they let kath ramona, pollux ramona, rng posse running
Oops bricked twice and lost 400 points.
Oops make that 3 times in a row
I dropped from 7k to 5k in one night so I feel ya
Don't play on tilt yall
I'm a chess player I always play on tilt
furious loser in the least loss fury tolerant games

Either convert them into illusion or put it on goliath
So he could make corpo exalt more

You need to taunt to regen 30 alienus first
Then exalt

So you get enhance from your wheel
Then you use the amp card
but I just found it funny seeing tb boosted, ambush Goli dealing 10 damage <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
Use shield per card enemies have
And then strike

It's on the same level of BS as gmurphy hameln
If you can't 3 turns? Just rng posse
meanwhile me got someone who put data is flesh turn 1
what did they do?
pulled 3 pickman posse in a row
they got the rng posse every turn from deck too
So how exactly does Sylvia's tea work?
Does it split health based on the normal max health of the target or the current max health of the target? Is playing Tea second always the choice?
Does it divide evenly between all awakers or all *current* awakers
I had someone nuke Doll and only get +20 max HP on Lily, but when I turned around and nuked Lily, I got almost 40 MHP on 24
which is just... not a number that makes sense to me
the tea split the target current health to whoever still alive on your side
so you can get like all the target hp if there is only one alive on your side
I thought it gave the enemy team the stats lol

honestly tea is better used in these situation:
-the enemy dps about to exalt/had put on a wheel
-reviver (tawil/celeste)
-if you're confident you can kill one target that turn
-when there are only two remaining alive on your side (the hp boost to 2 remain awakener on your side is much better than when it's 3/4)
watch the enemy can't do shit on your 130+ hp karen
You also generally don't want to use tea early because it thins their deck
btw the remove target from the game is so misleading
in the end its just an instant kill
so revive/gateway type of skill or posse will still work
I think initially it did actually remove but they changed it to just KO
<:24_Clown:1468259444423921871> i still remember that bug

I try to rewind with tawil
It doesn't work
man im starting to get sick of seeing data is flesh every single game
So fun to make a gamemode purely based on RNG

its silly that a wheel that costs 3 constantly feeds you a chance at a wincon every turn
just had a game where they got double void hues which is great

just top deck data, wait for them to get you down to last awakener, and then spam unequals and basically win <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
